meaning: adj.第二十的,二十分之一的n.第二十(个),二十分之一,(月)的第二十日
examples: "After the twentieth try," Wendy reminded him.
World War I left an indelible imprint on the twentieth-century world.
Some have called him the greatest entertainer of the twentieth century.
Normally 6, 000 workers churn out 240, 000 cars a year, a twentieth of Honda's global output.
The cast played hardball with Twentieth Television, to secure raises for expected eighth and ninth seasons.
